title: triodia repens
intro: Triodia repens, also known as the spear grass or spinifex grass, is a type of grass that is native to the deserts and grasslands of Australia. It has been used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The health benefits of Triodia repens include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Triodia repens can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in a topical cream or salve, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
